description: API lane reported NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION (no contract files) → analyzer preserves and routes to ISSUE_ONLY.

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Pre-classified category from lane worker is preserved (analyzer doesn't override)
rubric_hints.output_structure: category passed through; recommended_action correctly mapped per spec §3.6 matrix
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION is a NEW PR1 category; analyzer recognizes it
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Issue created surfaces 'add contract tooling' recommendation
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Tooling absence is not an error in analyzer; surfaces actionable Issue
